title: spondias cirouella
intro: Spondias cirouella, also known as the yellow mombin, is a tropical tree species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. Its health benefits include reducing fever, treating wounds, and providing relief from digestive issues, as well as being used to treat various respiratory problems such as bronchitis and cough. Spondias cirouella can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional medicine to create various herbal preparations.
